title: Recall Sum and Difference Identities for Sine
text: Recall the sum and difference identities for sine: $$\sin(A+B) $$=$$ $$sinAcosB$$ + $$cosAsinB$$ and $$\sin(A-B)$$ $$=$$ $$sinAcosB$$ $$-$$ $$cosAsinB$$

title: Apply the identities
text: Substitute the identities into the left side of the expression.
